name: Elder Road Outskirts
description: A broken road between camp, woods, ruins, and the Elder Stone.

tiles.name: Road Camp
tiles.description: A cold camp at the edge of the elder road.

tiles.name: Old Road
tiles.description: The road bends between weeds and broken stones.

tiles.name: Abandoned Chest
tiles.description: A supply chest left in the open.

tiles.name: Ash Woods
tiles.description: Grey trees lean over the path.

tiles.name: Weathered Shrine
tiles.description: A cracked shrine still remembers old blessings.

tiles.name: South Road
tiles.description: Boot prints cut through the dust.

tiles.name: Road Crossing
tiles.description: A narrow crossing watched by crows.

tiles.name: Scout Ambush
tiles.description: A goblin scout watches the road.

tiles.name: Long Bend
tiles.description: The road stretches toward ruined stones.

tiles.name: Fallen Ruins
tiles.description: Old walls sink into the grass.

tiles.name: Low Woods
tiles.description: The brush is low enough to pass.

tiles.name: Bandit Watch
tiles.description: A road bandit waits near a broken cart.

tiles.name: Middle Road
tiles.description: A safer stretch of cracked stones.

tiles.name: Roadside Cache
tiles.description: A hidden cache tucked beside the road.

tiles.name: Eastern Road
tiles.description: The air grows still.

tiles.name: Old Gate
tiles.description: The camp gate leans on rusted hinges.

tiles.name: Lower Road
tiles.description: A road of mud and pale grass.

tiles.name: Wolf Den
tiles.description: A starved wolf prowls between roots.

tiles.name: Stone Approach
tiles.description: Flat stones mark the approach.

tiles.name: Elder Stone
tiles.description: The old stone hums at the road's end.
